notes: Warzone → season lookup table. Only 3 warzones have CONFIRMED season/week data (917, 1901, 2007 via owner). Warzones 1981-2019 are listed as accessible-range (owner Warzone 2007 confirmed can access this range) but their season state is unknown — users are prompted to contribute their own warzone data. Anything outside this range needs the user to type it manually. NO FABRICATED season data.

917.notes: Confirmed by owner screenshot 2026-07-19 (Warzone #917 banner visible in-game). Season/week TBD — needs user confirmation.

1901.notes: Confirmed by owner screenshot 2026-07-19 showing 'Season 2: Polar Storm · Wk 1' badge.

2007.notes: Owner's own warzone (RONY R5). Merged bucket including KR alliances. S2 launch confirmed by owner 2026-07-19 as ~7d 11h out (2026-07-26).

1981.notes: In accessible range per owner 2026-07-19 (W2007 can see W1981-W2019). Season state unconfirmed — please contribute if you play here.

kr-mixed.notes: Korean-market warzones tend to launch S2 ~2 weeks ahead of NA/EU (community heuristic, unverified)

na-mixed.notes: NA warzones on standard First Fun release cadence

eu-mixed.notes: EU warzones typically 1-3 days after NA

latam-mixed.notes: LATAM warzones follow their own late-merge cycle

cn-mixed.notes: Chinese-market warzones (逆战:世界大战) may have region-locked events
